signal.description: Continue governed execution until .planning/VISION.md is materially satisfied with real product and operational outcomes. PM must keep adding roadmap items, include deployment and release work when needed, prefer existing discoverable GCP/GCS infrastructure, and escalate to human only for truly external actions.
